reviews.review_text: We had a great weekend away with my son’s football team. The kids loved cycling around the park, table tennis, swimming and the tennis courts. It’s also only a stone’s throw from the beach! The rooms are clean and comfortable, we will definitely stay again.

Had a great stay at Holiday Haven Husky. Premium powered site. Well maintained park and the girls in the office super friendly and so helpful.
We will be back for sure 💞💞

Bushland is where we stayed. Clean tidy and very spacious. Amenities so close by to all sites and very clean.
Definetly recommend and will be back especially when you can bring your dog.

This was our first time visiting this park but it won’t be our last. Wonderful experience. Courteous and efficient staff, excellent communication regarding booking and check in, immaculate studio cabin with everything you need . Brilliant position on the beach and so close to town. A real gem!

Always so helpful and friendly. Amazing spot, rooms are awesome, facilities great and the team are fantastic. So grateful to Liz and her team for helping me with some stuff I accidentally left at the room. They went above and beyond, very kind and caring.
Great location, well run campsite, a stone’s throw from the beach and dog friendly. The dream!

Holiday Haven Huskisson is located in an absolutely fantastic location on the Huskisson Bay and Beach. If you have dogs, this is a bonus as dogs are allowed off lead twice a day. But don't push your luck out side of these times. The local Council is stultifying financially and fines are a thing.
But don't let that put you off. The whole area is very friendly. The accommodation is spot on with out being expensive. The rooms are clean and most importantly, there is little noise.

A great dog friendly cabin at Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach.
Staying with my girlfriend & my doggie.
The cabin was such an easy cabin to stay for 5 nights.
A beautiful walkway  along the foreshore right on Huskisson beach .
To walk my doggie which we all loved to do.
I recommend Holiday Haven Huskisson beach for your stay.
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We just visited this campsite for the weekend, we only had a tent and we were very happy with all communication, accessing the park etc. The location is amazing, the site is clean and the facilities in the site are also fantastic, everyone was friendly and respectful of the environment and we are going to book again for a weekend coming up, thanks again everyone.

We stayed 3 nights in dog friendly cabin with our Labrador. The cabin was perfect, well equipped. Great location, easy walk to the beach and a 15 minute walk into town along a very nice path adjacent to the beach.

Terrible. Will not recommend anybody to book here. Location is next to the main road with a lot of noise. The camping area is just mud. Everything you bring gets dirty. Target audience is weird. Lots of trades getting piss drunk at 5pm. And then you pay 60 dollars for this. Had many more way better campsites then this for less then 10 dollars.

Only good thing are warm showers and a kitchen.

We spent two weeks here in our caravan on an ensure site. The ensuite was clean, in working order and a generous size. The site was nice and grassy with artificial turf for the caravan and awning. The site was plenty large enough for our caravan, awning and tow vehicle. The staff were helpful and friendly, but sometimes a little difficult to contact on the phone. The site was a little expensive, but I would still recommend staying here.
Great camp and lots to see and do close to everything you could want
Was amazing to wake up basically on the beach 🏖️

The noise level in the designated tent area with power outlets is truly unbearable. It's like sleeping on the street. We don't recommend camping there if you have a tent. The kitchen is very poor; there's nothing. There's only a stove, a microwave, and a kettle. If you want to use the toaster, the power goes out, so it's impossible.
The good think it’s in front of a nice beach
Good place to stay. Clean easy to use BBQ and large amenities. Tennis court is great! Fair bit of road noise and the kitchen is small / dated.
This is a fantastic park with friendly staff , steps from the beach and an easy walk into town , beautiful walking tracks

The position and amenities are good, but the sites are very poorly maintained. We were in a bushland camp area, the ground was uneven with patches of poor grass and dirt, the whole place got muddy and  slippery as soon as it rained.
They need to fix up the site surfaces and driveway gutters. They are charging for those sites the same as well maintained ones inside the park ground. In the middle sites the ground is lower then the driveway, campers were in a ditch that turned into a swamp and had water seep inside their tents

Amazing location on one of the best white sand beaches. This park is also located within an easy walk to town and near a fabulous bike park that goes right along the coast with stunning views of Jervis Bay. Facilities are a bit old but clean, pool is mainly for kids but adults have the sea! Highly recommend this as a stop off point especially for overseas visitors. We stayed on a powered site on Astro turf, which was great. I’d avoid the gravel sites if you can. The cabins look good, lots of variations and sizes. Staff are lovely.

The best holiday is a mix of location, amenities and exceptional service. Chloe, Dave and their amazing staff go above and beyond to ensure your stay with them is the best possible. Positioned right on the pristine Husky Beach and a short walk to all the fabulous restaurants, shops and famous Husky pub. The cleanest amenities, sites and cabins. But above all the friend and accommodating service. You are made to feel so welcome, like family and a second home. This is our 3rd Christmas here and will rebook again and again.
Super friendly staff, clean cabins and a nice view

Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach is the ideal accommodation for families, friends and get togethers. We had chosen this accommodation because we arranged a couple of days away with friends, where a couple of our friends had campervans and Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach accommodated for both campervans and cabins for those who don’t have campervans. Each cabin has one free parking spot, located conveniently right beside your cabin. We stayed in the fully equipped self-contained cabins – you have all the necessities (kitchen appliances; kitchen ware; tele; shower; toilet; lounge; dining table and even an outdoor setting), just like home but on a smaller scale. It’s very neat and smells super clean. But it doesn’t just stop there, the biggest highlights is its central location. It’s within easy walking distance to local cafés, restaurants, clubs/pubs and shops, without needing to drive. At the same time, it’s close to the beach, giving you the best of both worlds and coastal relaxation – perfect to explore Huskisson, right at your doorstep. Security is clearly a top priority at Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach, there are controlled access points for both vehicles and pedestrians, where you are issued a unique code for entry and exit, including communal bathroom facilities. It is well managed and adds a lot of peace of mind, especially for families or solo travellers. I would highly recommend this place for couples, families, or friends looking for a convenient, enjoyable and stress-free stay and staff are friendly, approachable and super helpful.

Absolutely love Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach. It’s a great park in a fantastic location, with friendly and helpful staff. The only downside is that the pool is a bit small, but being right on the beach more than makes up for it!
Great customer service.  Great location with a 5 minute coastal walk into the small sea side town of Huskisson. Thoroughly enjoyed the accommodation.
Best spot on the south coast, great park and perfect location
The bush camping backs on to the main road between huskisson and Vincentia. It is incredibly loud trying to sleep when your head is a few meters away from the road. Nice nearby beach though.
They very graciously hosted the Coast to Capitol Mokin run for accommodation and a sausage sizzle.

Location-beach front...perfect|Atmosphere-friendly |Rooms-varies depending which cabin, but pretty good all round |Value-off season-excellent rates ans special deals |Cleanliness-very tidy park|Noise level....children can be, but also the dogs can be too|Service-second to none. These amazing humans will do all humanly possible to make your stay perfect |Amenities-great||Our go to park!

It should be advertised that the location is literally on the main road between Huskinson and Vincentia. So convenience is great but if you’re after a quiet night sleep you should look elsewhere. Feels criminal to charge people to sleep next to a main road. At least I can leave a review to warn others.

The park was fabulous, close to town, easy walk.  Everything was so clean and the staff were exceptional.  Really enjoyed our stay, definitely will return.|Thanks you girls in the office, your smiley faces and friendliness was refreshing.  Wish we could have experienced this in other parks we visited along our journey.  You certainly made our last part of our trip special, thank you 😄😄
Had an amazing time there, and the views and things to do around there makes it worth while! If i ever swing around again I'll be Camping there again!

Fantastic service from the lovely ladies at the reception desk on arrival! They truly go above and beyond — I’m a busy person, and they were so helpful, offering printing, scanning, and just being incredibly accommodating. It’s the kind of service you’d expect at a five-star hotel. A lovely place to stay overall, and I’m really happy holidaying here with the family. A great experience all around!

Throughly enjoyed the location and town and beaches wow. The park is well placed apart from the road noise as the back where all the caravan sites are. The sites are also very very tight so plan ahead to ensure you can get in and not get stressed. We loved the easy walk tot be beaches in the afternoon and everything around. The facilities are a little tired but clean :-) overall great 👍🏻.

Was really dissapointed with the bushland site we stayed at. Was right by the road which gets a fair bit of traffic. There is not much that's 'bushland' with the bushland sites, so don't expect too much. In the site given (169) the allocated power terminal was in such a weird spot it didn't even reach the main part of the site with an extension lead. The price did not reflect the quality. The reception staff member was nice and the amenities were good.
A big thanks to the team at Huskisson holiday haven. They fixed the couple of little concerns so promptly with a smile. Keep up the great service.
Just a brilliant park and great staff very friendly and helpful

Right on the beach, perfect weather (blue sky time)! Great coffee van (Emma makes a truly awesome coffee). What more could you ask for! Living our second stint with Holdiay Haven Parks.  ❤️ EDIT...4th visit and still loving it! 10/10 to the amazing ladies in front office who honour of their watch to make your stay perfect ❤️❤️

I had a wonderful stay at Holiday Haven Huskisson! From the moment I arrived, the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful and gave me some great recommendations for nearby walking trails, cafes and restaurants

I stayed in a beautiful cabin that was spotlessly clean, comfortable, and had everything I needed for my little winter getaway. It was the perfect comfortable escape

The location is truly unbeatable—right across from the beach, which made catching the sunrise and going for morning walks a dream. The views of the sunrise over the water were absolutely breathtaking. I would definitely recommend this holiday park and will certainly return

I was disappointed with our stay after our cabins bunks were riddled with ants. There was no service recovery when the front desk was notified. My kids were unable to sleep in the bunks.

An apology would have been a bare minimum I’d expect.

Great location though.
Nice cabin, friendly staff. Favorite location

This is our favourite place to stay when holidaying! Close enough to walk into town. Beautiful cabins with awesome views. Would highly recommend this place for holidays. Clean rooms and different rooms available for all budgets

We stayed in our caravan as a couple in late June.
Such a beautiful seaside town and area to holiday in.
The staff here at the park were amazing.  Chloe and her girls on the desk were so friendly and welcoming.
Whilst here we encountered a terrible storm.  Without hesitation the staff checked on people in the park to see if we were all ok.
We opted to move into a cabin mid storm as the winds were horrendous and the amount of heavy rain was the worst I have seen (in my lifetime).
Without hesitation staff got us into a cabin until the conditions of the storm calmed down and until we felt safe to return to our caravan.
We would like to thank them all at the park for their kindness and willingness to help .  We have never had such wonderful customer service before in all our years of caravanning .
We would highly recommend this park and one day we will be back.
Thankyou again for a lovely stay.

Ian and Pam Victoria
Great weekend catch up with friends. Great amenities and location
Fantastic place to stay, short walk into town, beautiful beaches, staff very friendly and facilities great.
Worst experience ever we stayed in cabin 12 and it was dirty and had hair and stains all over mattress. Be better.

We spent 11 days on a powered site with ensuite and found the park, the location and more-so the management to be nothing short of outstanding. Whilst there we experienced the recent ‘South Coast Bomb’ weather phenomena during which the park management made every effort to ensure that park patrons were safe and secure and in several instances offered and provided alternative and/or at no cost accommodation options to ensure that guests were safe or if they had concerns. Park management are to be very much congratulated and their support was indeed appreciated. It was not our first time at this park and certainly won’t be our last.

A perfect winter escape in an unbeatable location right across from the beach! It made catching the sunrise and going for morning walks so easy. We stayed in a cabin that had everything we needed and really enjoyed our time. Great views!
Would definitely return - will have to try out the camping facilities too!
Best service ever and the views are stunning fully recommended

Yet another lovely time spent at Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach! We love this place and we love it even more in the off season when it’s quiet and we get 30% off! Yeah we found a pair of socks and a water bottle under the bed which says the cleaners might need to be a bit more thorough but who cares once you see that view every day! We just love that the beautiful, calm and sparkling Huskisson Beach is a 30 second walk away and you can stroll left or right on the sand or on a shared path. Staff were helpful and friendly from start to finish which means we will be back. Seeya next time!

Being a full-time caravaner, I would definitely put this park on the list of parks that i would stay at again. Great location( only 15 minutes walk to town)and directly on Husskisson beach.
Awesome level sites with artificial turf some with ensuites. Yes, amenities building is aged, but the showers and toilets were one of the cleanest I've seen.
We loved camping in the bushland at Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach. Clean, quiet, and perfectly located near the ocean—it’s an ideal spot for relaxing and reconnecting with nature. Highly recommend!

The powered sites in the bush camp was just awesome.
It is near the main road so can be a bit noisy.
It's so close to the beach and lagoon with ease of access to both.
The amenities were great, but it would be good to see a family block put in as it's hard to shower with an infant without having a safe space to do so.

We had such a wonderful stay at Holiday Haven Huskisson! The cabin had everything we needed. It was clean, comfortable and well-equipped for our little getaway. The park itself was amazing, with two fantastic play parks that my 3yo daughter absolutely loved. The beach being right there was the cherry on top!

From our initial enquiry to booking and throughout our stay, the service was exceptional. A special thank you to Corinne and Chloe - you were both so friendly and helpful and truly made our experience even better. We thoroughly enjoyed our time here and can’t wait to come back!

The park is nice, staff are friendly but we stayed in a cabin which was over priced and very uncomfortable as the bed mattress we could feel the springs my husband and I have sore backs. The trip was for my 60th birthday we also had family come which stayed in the large cabin over priced. I wouldn't stay there again but I love the place and will try the park up the road because this one was so uncomfortable and towels couldn't be used as they smelt like vomit so we used our towels luck I brought some. Also didn't know it was a smoke free park if I know this I wouldn't of stayed here they should have a smoking area.

We had an exceptional experience with the staff on Saturday evening and Sunday morning. Due to extremely bad weather, my family and I were forced to evacuate our tent. The out-of-hours team went above and beyond, providing a cabin for two families to stay safe in.

On Sunday morning, two members of your team patrolled the site, assisting us and others with packing up in poor weather conditions. Their kindness, professionalism, and willingness to help were truly commendable—a real credit to your team! Thank you for your outstanding service.

Great Park, awesome staff, girls in the office were fantastic,great location, road behind the park a bit busy,right on the beach which is awesome, beautiful sand,|Had an en-suite site, Syn grass which is fantastic, no need for annex flooring, en-suite was fabulous,|Only set back its super busy on the weekends!|Definitely back again. |Thanks all.

One of the most relaxing places i have been in a long time. We took our fur babies and they were very welcomed everywhere we went. The park was fantastic and such a beautiful spot on the beach. Will definitely go back soon. Great experience 👍

This was a nice place and all but I have to say the wifi was horrible it had one bar and disconnected ever 20 seconds while I was trying to finish some work it was alright but I don’t think i would stay there again. The area around was enjoyable though.

An outstanding experience from the time of booking to then checking out and everything in-between.
Communication and information was tremendous, including updates whilst enjoying our stay.
The location is exceptional.
We had a cabin which was very well presented almost as new inside being both fresh and clean. Beds, linen and towels were of top quality.
An Excellent weekend away and stay!

First class facilities clean comfortable rooms.
Great location short stroll to the bay.
Helpful friendly staff.

Just wanted to say what a fantastic holiday van and cabin park.   Close to the beach fascilitirs are excellent, very friendly staff, the cabin was perfect, mattress sooo comfortable.   Loved our holiday with good friends.  |Huskisson is a great place for a holiday.  Jenny Rich
So close to such a beautiful calm beach, walk and bike tracks. A gorgeous part of the world

A lady who had nothing better to do with her time, gathered her own friends to make a complaint about my elderly mother and caused her to be asked to leave the park. |My mother’s dog barked when we entered and exited their cabin, a sweet lil sausage dog, not aggressive.|Unfortunately because this lady was told that her complaint alone wasn’t justified, the park allowed the complaint by her friends who were not close to my mums cabin, be taken into consideration.|DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS TO ANYONE WITH A DOG.

Great caravan park right on the beach. The best location you could hope for. Swim in the bay or in the pool. A short ride or walk along the bike path "full of amazing views", back into town for all your needs. 👌

Great caravan park right on Husky Beach.
You can also get a great cup of coffee from Emma each morning

Holiday Haven Huskisson is perfectly located with easy access to the beaches and to town. The cabin condition was great and clean. Linen of good quality. Would just add a doormat, a  sofa of a size that caters to the size of the accommodation.
The staff members are friendly and helpful.
Would highly recommend 😃

We stayed overnight in our campervan and it was very last minute (called the day prior during summer peak pre Christmas), and were given a spot in the bush camp which is a small camp detached outside the main camp (but just in front of it). For a 90$ stay, I admit we expected more. The space is very limited and squeezed into the bush camp which I don’t think is worth that money. Bathrooms and bbq are all ok. The main camp is nicer for bbq directly on the beach so better go there if it’s available. The beach in front of the camp is very nice
Beautiful park in central location walking distance along ocean tracks to town. Staff very friendly helpful will definitely be returning

Lovely caravan park in a great location.

Pros
- The park is an easy 1.5k ish walk to the Main Street where there is a grocer, coffee shops, shops and restaurants. The walk is beautiful with well manicured parks.
- Located on a calm and clear beach. It is a dog beach during certain hours of the day. So beautiful!
- Lots of parks for kids to play within walking distance.
- Staff were friendly and helpful when we wanted to move to an Astroturf site.
- AstroTurf sites were manicured and comfortable
- Amenities were clean. Though dated. Would probably book an ensuite site next time.
- Nice pool area that is clean.

Cons
- Camp kitchen. Not super great nor a full kitchen.
- When we made our booking a few months ago we enquired about bringing our dog. We were told our dates fell under the “No dogs” allowed time of year. Yet for the duration of our time there were multiple people with dogs, both on campsites and cabins. Either the no dogs is a soft rule or we were given the wrong information. Disappointing as we had to board our dog and could have saved some money!
- The park is located on a road that you can hear some cars zooming past during evening/night. It didn’t bother us but I wouldn’t want a site next to the road.

Overall a nice caravan park in a fantastic location.

Our tent collapsed and broke under wind when we were out. The staff helped secure it down, called to let us know and helped figure out what bits broke so we could buy spares when we were out.  Very helpful

We had a short staying at the Holiday Haven and everything worked out just fine!

We were welcomed by the employees Corrine and Julie (lovely and polite persons), they helped us with our needs and saved our weekend from being a lost trip!

Besides that, All facilities were clean and well maintained, which made our staying very cozy.

Thank you Corrine and Julie!

We have stayed here twice now. Powered site. Very clean, tidy and very well maintained grounds and facilities. Staff are friendly, prompt and helpful. Kids have enjoyed the pool and playground. Convenient and short walk to access to Huskisson Beach and Moona Moona creek beach (which is perfect for the kids). Prices have gone up making it challenging for our family to continue our annual holiday here. Staff have been very accomodating though.
Clean, cheap, great aircon. Amazing location right on the beach. Only complaint is that wifi isn't great.
Great stop over

Nice campsite near dog friendly pristine beach. Facilities are good with small communal kitchen and lots of bbqs.
I’ve stayed several times, but was disappointed during my last stay by staff not following up more promptly on noise complaints due to a larger group, and also cleaning efforts of the ensuite bathroom lacked this time :(

Our fifth year in a row at Holiday Haven to celebrate an early Christmas celebration. Having been given 6 consecutive beachfront cabins made it ideal for all the family to enjoy their 4 day stay. A couple of maintenance issues were seen to in quick time and was very pleasing. Looking forward to returning next year.
They require you to pay for 2 nights and won't refund you if you cancel any less than 2 Weeks! What a scam.
Always our home away from home on the South Coast.

Stayed at the bushlands powered camping site recently. Was really excited thinking this would be quiet with good facilities. Totally mistaken!  Highly overpriced ($150 for 2 nights), for the faculties that were available and wasn’t quiet at all!!  Our campsite backed onto a major road connecting Huskisson and Vincentia which was really loud. The campsite pictures doesn’t highlight the snugness of the campsite and that it’s a lot busier and enclosed with a fence and not “nature”
The location being so close to the beach was its saving grace.  The beach was lovely.
Thank but we won’t be returning xx

Nice location but considered overpriced at $75pn. Park doesn't do deals but offered us the next day an extra night/half price if we wanted to extend our stay from 2 night to 3. We might have taken the deal when we asked the question at check in but we made other plans. Jervis Bay Caravan Park up the road is doing 7 day stays at $55pn as advised by other travellers and they are leaving here to save $140. Not all doom and gloom, check in staff were very good and offered us sights to look at when we arrived. $60 sites are up against the back fence and are pretty basic. We picked the best of what was offered at $75 which was a good sized artificial grass site. Sites slope so bring your chocks. Main road at the back of park is busy and very noisy until about 9pm and ramps up again in the morning. Amenities are old looking but work fine. At the end of the day, this place probably works as a holiday park but as a full time traveller on the road would not consider returning  when there are better options available.
Reply. Don't know how nice turns into love of a location and good turns into great customer service. Great spin.
We stayed in the campground area south of the main park & it was great. Very easy & quick access to the beach & overall a pretty safe & quiet spot. Facilities were clean & well maintained.
Great place for families and young kids
Perfect location, great views, nice spacious cabin & great price. We really enjoyed our time here & plan on coming back.

Our favourite place to stay in Huskisson! They have two lovely pet-friendly cabins and the staff are amazing. With super comfortable beds and a full kitchen, it truly feels like home away from home, and just a minute walk down to the beach!

The express check-in process was seamless. We received an email with our cabin and PIN details the day before, making our arrival hassle-free.

Upon entering the cabin, there was a noticeable scent. I’d describe it as a cleaning agent smell, though my husband thought it was more like a "cheap spa" fragrance. It wasn’t unpleasant, but it was distinct and hard to define.

The cabin itself was spacious and clean. We stayed in the Collingwood type, which had two bedrooms: one with a queen bed and the other with a three-tier bunk bed, two of which were made up, accommodating a total of four people.

Towels were neatly placed on each bed. The WiFi didn’t require a password, but it was quite slow, so I ended up relying on my mobile data.

The kitchen was impressively stocked, especially for someone who doesn't cook. It had everything you’d need if you wanted to prepare meals during your stay. The fridge was a standard size and completely empty, except for a packet of milk, which wasn’t an issue for me.

I was pleasantly surprised by the cleanliness of the kettle—probably the cleanest one I’ve ever seen in any accommodation! Most kettles I’ve come across have rusty coils, but this one looked brand new.

The bed was quite springy, but the comforter kept us warm without needing to turn on the heater. The pillows, however, didn’t work for me—either too low with one or too high when stacked.

We checked out before 9 a.m., following the instructions to drop the keys at reception. I placed them in the "Key Box Push," the only spot that seemed appropriate, though it wasn’t locked. I’ve emailed the property to confirm, just to be sure they collect the keys promptly.

The location was decent. There’s only a café on-site, which operates out of a pushcart van, so options are limited if you're looking to eat nearby. However, it's just a quick 2-minute drive to the nearest shops, which was very convenient.

Awesome bush Caravan site and location  with direct access to waterfront and Moona Moona Creek and Lagoon .
Amenities were perfectly clean everyday .
Professional and friendly service from Corrine from enquiry to booking our site .
First of many regular stays in the future for us down Huskisson .

Love your work Holiday Haven Huskisson Beach and the most welcoming Corrine 🤩

Shower water pressure fantastic.
Rooms are really nice.
Fantastic location

My family and I go down here every year at Christmas and it is a wonderful place and would highly recommend. A great place for couples, family and there is even a few cabins for big groups. It is right near the beach and I would recommend to go in the summer. It has multiple parks for the kids, a basketball court, a pool and multiple barbecues and eating tables. The rooms are clean, just a little small. And sometimes the TV does not work in the cabins.
Great location and lovely amenities. Even in the rainy weather it was a wonderful stay.
I can't fault the place other than the 1 car per spot rule which was hard as we had visiting family.

An excellent caravan stay with our small dog, made better by friendly, happy and responsive reception staff. Thank you, every step was pleasant; from making the booking, checking in (even when we went to the wrong van park initially after hours), upgrading to an ensuite site through to checking out and allowing extra time to wash/dry our clothes following the rain. When our little shih tzu cut his foot they even guided the mobile vet to our site. The grounds staff were also happily out each day gardening  cleaning and fixing things. Thanks Huskisson Holiday Haven we will be back.
We took our new camper here for a test run and found it to be a great spot to stay

This place hides all of its nonsense requirements in its terms and conditions (which they shouldve figured out that no one reads by now). We werent allowed more than 1 car inside for 2 separate parties, despite it being the winter off-season and there was an enormous amount of space. The place claims this is due to insurance reasons... being such a big chain making tonnes of dosh - MAYBE YOU SHOULD UPDATE YOUR INSURANCE ??
Never in my life have I experienced such rude service and ridiculous terms at a caravan park. Rooms and amenities were dirty. Would not stay again.

recently stayed at Holiday Haven Huskisson and was thoroughly impressed by their exceptional service. In honor of Mother's Day and due to the unfortunate rainy weather, the staff kindly offered a complimentary late checkout, which was greatly appreciated. While the persistent rain meant that we couldn't explore the facilities as much as we would have liked, the overall experience was still remarkable.The check-in process was a breeze thanks to their efficient express check-in service, and communication with the staff was excellent throughout our stay. The location of the holiday park is simply perfect, with stunning beachfront access and a charming park complete with a children's playground overlooking the beach. This made for a delightful view, even in the rain. Although the weather was not on our side, the warmth and attentiveness of the staff ensured we had a comfortable and memorable stay. I highly recommend.
Beautiful spot, 3 minutes walk to beach, nice and relaxing
Enjoyed a powered site for our caravan.  Good amenities.

Caravanning, so don't know about the cabins.
Good clean amenities.
Perfect location, right alongside the beach and bike/walking path. A dog friendly beach.
Short stroll to Huskisson town centre.
Very nice caravan park.

* Great facilities (tennis court, pool, playgrounds, BBQ), well maintained & clean|* Very good value (powered site with a family)|* Very prompt and helpful staff |* Easy access to beach, creek, shorts drive to other popular beaches |* Excellent communication via text and email |* Firm standards regarding noise which made it a peaceful place to be|* Good security measures ||We will be returning to Holiday Haven Huskisson!

Very nice place we were trying to book a place overnight, on the website it said closed at 6pm by 5.30 the had switched the phone over to after hours.. which is mot professional, luckily we arrived b4 6pm and got a pitch ( I said are you nearly finished, she said 14mins and counting)  location is great, there were only 3 pitches available that we  could see, but used toilets and showers no problem irrespective of the amount of people staying  there, good access via footpath to the local Harbour, there were a couple of nice pubs on the way for meals n drinks..

A slice of paradise, cabins are lovely and are spotless.  Location is brilliant, right on beautiful beaches, and just a short stroll into town. We had a small issue in our cabin, and they sorted it immediately. Staff are very friendly and efficient.  Can't wait to return
Had a great time, plenty of things to do in close distance,amenities were clean and lawn areas were well kept. See you next time!!!!
Amazing stay at Huskisson holiday haven. Excellent location, facilities and staff. Will definitely be back.

Apparently they are not pet friendly at Christmas Times!!!!!
It is extremely weird actually Jervis Bay Territory send us to them!
They are famous with dog friendly camping site!
This is extremely 3 hours of driving for nothing lol
Very clean and modern cabin, right on the beach
Good location, friendly staff, good size sites.
Was on sporting tournament weekend absolutely enjoyed the haven

Booked in the arvo while travelling for that night.
Knowledgeable competent human answered phone and took booking.
Easy access, clean functional amenities, quiet.

Thanks
Location is great with direct access to the beach and two playgrounds for the kids.Cabin was clean and tidy and staff were lovely we will definitely be returning.

Had an absolutely wonderful time during my stay. The staff were lovely and helpful throughout my stay. The location is amazing and the site was in excellent condition.

I couldn’t recommend it enough for anyone wanting to stay in the Jervis Bay area.

Be careful booking with this place. Their terms and conditions are deliberately ambiguous. They are happy for you to book and take your money. But when you get there to stay they will reject your booking if anyone in your group is under 18 and does not have their legal guardian present. They have little care that they have ruined your weekend and wasted all your fuel money to drive down the coast. I would recommend booking with a non holiday haven park as holiday haven can't be trusted. They change their terms and conditions after payment has been made.
Terrible experiences

We drove all the way from Brisbane for my friends last camping trip before his hopefully life-saving surgery. This trip was planned months before, we had called up discussing ages, logistics and booking details, despite these pedantic efforts when we arrived at the camp site to check in we were told we were not allowed to stay as we had 17 year olds and 18 year olds staying on the site. Apparently under 18 year olds need to stay with parental supervision only and despite adults on the site we were not allowed to stay. Whilst we have no problems with the policy this policy was not brought to our attorney and was not alerted as a problem during our many phone calls and booking. Meaning that despite the strenuous efforts to book the site due to the lack of information and organisation from the holiday parks behalf we were told we had to get a refund a leave. No compensation or sympathy was given out and we had to sacrifice our whole weekend away despite all the efforts we had gone to. Ruined my holiday and wasted hours of time.
Have stayed here twice now, such a beautiful spot, easy to book and friendly staff, amenities are always clean, 2 min walk to the beach and 15 minute walk to Husky, definitely recommend to stay here.
Pleasant reception. Text communication perfect. Great stay. We'll be back for sure

I had a great trip and the location is excellent!! My only complaint (although quite a big one as all my groceries required an oven) the “fully equipped kitchen” did not have an oven!!!! Only a small microwave for a family cabin that sleeps 8! It was very inconvenient. Bedside lamps would be a nice inclusion too and a ceiling fan in the bedroom. But I enjoyed the spacious balcony and bbq.

A FAR CRY FROM A HAVEN.
We camped at Holiday Haven Huskisson for 6 nights and the campground was hugely disappointing. We choose it because of the the amenities and location. However what wasn’t made clear was that the campground was in a different location - a bush area away from the from the main site - away from the beach, right on a major road and you had to cross a road and walk a significant distance to access the pool, playground and tennis court. The most disturbing aspect was the main road. We had constant traffic noice from a very busy road all day and through the night. Two nights in a row there were very rowdy locals roaming right next to the sites and on one occasion a man was screaming explicit verbal abuse at the campsite and mentioned owning a rifle. It was very disturbing, upsetting and with little children around I felt hugely exposed and unsafe. There was an unlocked gate for easy access for anyone right into the campground, and with such unpleasant people about it made us feel very unprotected. Needless to say we didn’t get much sleep. The toilets were rarely serviced - the mens bathroom had poo on the ground for 3 days before it was cleaned. When I called to complain the lady at reception told me I could leave and hung up on me. Our campsite was also surrounded by lots of trees and in high winds these were concerning. The one redeeming feature was that it’s in beautiful Jervis bay and close to a lovely creek which was wonderful for the kids. But overall a very unpleasant camping experience and we ended up going home early.
Beautiful and relaxing place to visit
Amazing caravan park in the best location. Across the road from the Jervis Bay beach. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Great atmosphere. Play park, tennis court, pool and dog friendly.
Well set-up cabins tent sites great.cabins  cost &575.00 for two nights a dear
Love staying here!!! Coffee is amazing and she’s there from 7am!

We stayed for two nights and honestly it was not long enough!!

Great cabin, dog friendly, fantastic staff.

Great location and directly opposite the beach, without a lie, less than 200mtrs to waters edge.

Emma’s coffee van a must first thing in the morning, great coffee and $5 a large cup, very good value, (cash only).

Fantastic walk to Vincentia next town down the road, easy walk, well maintained path and excellent sights.

Cabin was clean and well serviced, clean towels and amenities, decent size for two of us and two dogs.

Well suited to families of all sizes.

Plenty to do on site, everyone was friendly.

Drive slowly: there’s no rush and there are plenty of children about… just being kids and running and playing.

Venture into town is around 2kms from the caravan park,

We will be back!!
A great location to base our adventures from
Beautiful place, great amenities, service was excellent.

A lovely clean caravan park

The female toilets and showers were clean at all times and they even have a bath

I can’t comment on service or rooms as we had our own camper trailer and we had no contact sadly with the owners as it was all done online.

2 minute walk to the beach

It was a little further from town than we were expecting ( summer would be a nice walk but winter nope )

We will definitely stay their again.
We stayed at the powered bushland Site for the long weekend. The sites were large and clean, showers nice and hot, everything was well kept. We will definitely be returning.
Great park! Love the artificial turf!
